name: open-frontend-pages
description: A curated registry of open-source frontend pages and templates that are safe to preview, remix, and reuse.

scripts.cf:project:create: npx wrangler@4.98.0 pages project create open-frontend-pages --production-branch main
scripts.deploy:cf: npm run build && npx wrangler@4.98.0 pages deploy apps/web/out --project-name open-frontend-pages --branch main
